title: Is it possible to create a new user via API?
excerpt: Is it possible to create a new user via API?

posts.author: etaileers (Etai Leers)
posts.cookedHtml: Is it possible to create a new user via API?

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @etaileers

Welcome to the community!. Unfortunately the API does not support the modification of the users object. See: https://api.developer.monday.com/docs/users-queries-1

posts.author: sysboss (Sys Boss)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi,
still not possible to create a new user via API?
@basdebruin the link seems broken

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
monday API docs

Users

Every monday.com user is part of an account or organization and has a unique set of user details. Users also have different roles within an account and can be admins, team members, members, viewers, guests, subscribers, board owners, or in a custom...

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @basdebruin for the reply!

posts.author: sysboss (Sys Boss)
posts.cookedHtml:
thanks @basdebruin
I saw that in the doc you linked to me it talks about how to work with an existing user (in all the endpoints it refers to the user id).
I am looking for a way to create/invite a user via their email? please confirm that it is not possible to do this and I can only do it by hand via the dashboard with the INVITE MEMBER button?
thank you very much for your patience

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
hi @sysboss

That is correct. There is (currently) no API support to create new users.
